final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce promotional poster for 绿联私有云 brand's 618 anniversary sale event.

Style/medium: needs a festive e-commerce campaign aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a bold, attention-grabbing vertical poster layout — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include 绿联私有云 brand identity and 618 anniversary sale as the hero message
Scene/backdrop: needs a celebratory campaign backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a vibrant, high-energy festive atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with 绿联 brand identity (green tones) combined with 618 sale energy — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "绿联私有云" and "618" and "周年庆"
Constraints: must read clearly as an e-commerce sale announcement poster
Avoid:
